task_completion.description: Estimate energy consumption using EUI factors based on year built.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code applying conditional logic (e.g., np.select, pd.cut, or .loc) to calculate 'energy_kwh' based on 'year_built' (pre-1980/NaN: 90, 1980-1999: 70, 2000-2009: 50, 2010+: 35).

task_completion.description: Aggregate energy consumption and building counts by zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing a groupby operation on 'zone_id' that calculates the total (sum) energy consumption and the count of buildings.

task_completion.description: Export the aggregated data to a CSV file.
